key.name: trigger
key.description: The key combination that opens the accent picker.

key.name: delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before the popup appears.

key.name: popup-timeout-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds after which the popup closes automatically.

key.name: accents
key.description: Optional JSON overriding the built-in table. Empty = built-in table.

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Show an icon and menu in the GNOME Shell top bar.

key.name: layouts
key.description: xkb layout ids where the shortcut is active. Empty = all layouts.
